channel.title: How to fetch custom table data in frontity homepage?
channel.description:
Hey,
Suppose, lets assume I have created a custom page in wordpress dashboard that contains some custom settings needed for the website I've stored them in the different table instead of meta data.
How can I fetch these data on the frontity homepage?

item.title: How to fetch custom table data in frontity homepage?
item.dc:creator: avinashxw
item.description:
Hey,

Suppose, lets assume I have created a custom page in wordpress dashboard that contains some custom settings needed for the website I’ve stored them in the different table instead of meta data.

How can I fetch these data on the frontity homepage?

Read full topic
item.source: How to fetch custom table data in frontity homepage?
